invariant: Cached trajectory evidence backed by a revoked Glean source must be revalidated before it can support risk output.
pass_fail_definition: PASS = revoked Glean source refs are omitted from accepted citations and surfaced as source_revoked degradation. FAIL = revoked cached trajectory source supports an indicator.

fixture_design_notes.state_sql: Seeds one active user source and one revoked Glean source for a cached trajectory scenario.
fixture_design_notes.expected_provenance: Records the SourceRevoked warning/counter shape required by the W5-C packet.
